programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Karime and Fernanda's date takes a sudden turn and the gang heads to a party. A visitor makes an impression and Jacky invites him to the house, but men feel uncomfortable and want to kick him out.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Rocío joins the gang and she is thirsty for revenge. Santiago and Alba surprise everyone with a polyamorous ceremony. Diego can't hold his drink and his hard partying affects him.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The party continues, but Diego makes a surprising decision. Jaylín joins the gang and, while her welcome party gets out of control, Karime plans the first initiation in the house.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Alba's initiation is a success, but Jacky uses Altafulla to bother her. A woman visits the house and Carlos falls for her while José and Beni fight over Karime.

programme.title: Kendra On Top

programme.desc: So You Think You Can Dance alumnus Jonathan Platero wants to throw an ambush wedding for his fiancee Oksana, of Dancing With the Stars. It's a David Tutera first. Can everyone keep the secret?

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: Kim deals with the aftermath of Lisa and Anthony's big fight. China's sister is the new salon receptionist. Kim gives Macy Gray big hair while Angela ends up in a brawl with Naja at her own salon launch party.

programme.title: L.A. Hair

programme.title: Tamar & Vince

programme.title: El Talismán

programme.title: El Talismán
programme.desc: Antonio se plantea eliminar a Gregorio para quedar al mando de “El Alcatraz” y recurre a la ayuda de Elvira, quien colocará una cantidad de veneno en la medicina, para que Gregorio no muera.

programme.title: El Talismán
programme.desc: Antonio suplica a su padre que no se lleve los carros que les regaló a sus hijas. Luego Gregorio le pide a Valentín que vigile a Antonio para que no descubra que falsificó el testamento de su madre.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Pedro le dice a Basilio que Humberto esconde algo sobre él y Leonardo, se encuentra con Elmer. El Chamoy amenaza a Ignacio con una pistola y le dice que le dé información sobre Leonardo. Inés le confiesa a Paloma que tiene miedo.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Elmer le advierte a Ignacio que no le haga daño a Leonardo. Fernanda le dice a Pedro que lo ama, él le contesta que su amor lo hace seguir adelante. Leonardo le exige a Elmer que salga de la vida de su madre y de su hermana.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Nora le pregunta a Humberto si ya habló con Pedro sobre lo de la adopción. Fernanda logra que Perico firme los documentos que Ignacio le entregó. Elmer llama a Ignacio y le pone la grabación donde él le dice que mate a Armando.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Pedro escucha a Fernanda hablando por teléfono y oye cuando la llaman señorita Blanco. Él recibe una llamada del doctor que operará a Santiago. Ignacio y Elmer tratan de llegar a un acuerdo.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Lorenzo regresa con ganas de venganza y la intensión de revelar verdades a la prensa que hundirían a Gustavo, pero Aurora tiene un plan para volver a ser congelada. Blanca le pide a Martín que se haga un examen de ADN para ver si son hermanos.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Lorenzo se despide de Aurora en medio del teatro que ella creó. Martín también ve a Aurora y queda muy impresionado, pero su juego tiene consecuencias graves para su salud y una decisión médica puede cambiarlo todo. Inés vuelve a engañar a Blanca.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Aurora se deja seducir por los deseos de Martín. Blanca los sorprende, siente celos y trata muy mal a Aurora. Esta comienza a cansarse de sus propias mentiras y quiere que su padre la descongele. Gustavo recibe una inesperada declaración de amor.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Las llamadas clandestinas de Gustavo a Natalia despiertan los celos de Lorenzo, que se lo reclama a puño limpio. El director está muy enfermo y consulta a Aurora sobre la criogenización.

programme.title: El Talismán
programme.desc: Antonio suplica a su padre que no se lleve los carros que les regaló a sus hijas. Luego Gregorio le pide a Valentín que vigile a Antonio para que no descubra que falsificó el testamento de su madre.

programme.title: El Talismán
programme.desc: Pedro cae en la trampa preparada por Antonio y Lucrecia, pero Camila descubre que Pedro le ha mentido sobre su esposa, y que Lucrecia es su amante. Antonio llega a consolarla.

programme.title: El Talismán
programme.desc: Gregorio descubre a Pedro en sus tierras, por lo que este último decide ir a matarlo, pero Lucrecia le impide hacerlo. Al llegar a su casa, el señor Ibarra descubre que Camila estaba allí.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Sure, raw tomato sauces are fast, but if the sauce is watery and bland, who cares? Likewise, asparagus-based pasta sauces are often bland and boring. In this episode, we keep things simple while avoiding these common problems.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen prepares two Indian favorites: chicken biryani and mulligatawny soup.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pissaladière is Provençal street food, a fragrant, pizza-like tart prized for its contrast of salty black olives and anchovies against a backdrop of sweet caramelized onions and thyme. We figure out how to make a great version of this French classic.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Too often, eggplant Parmesan is a soggy, oily mess. And pasta with chicken and broccoli is heavy and bland. But after many tests in the kitchen, we've come up with recipes that give these simple, honest dishes the respect they deserve.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pasta all' amatriciana is perhaps Rome's most famous dish. Despite the fancy name, it's nothing more than long-strand pasta sauced with tomatoes, onion, bacon, and hot pepper flakes and dusted with cheese. We show you how to master this simple dish.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Osso buco, literally "bone with a hole," is the Italian term for veal shanks. This meaty cut, akin to beef shanks or lamb shanks, becomes meltingly tender when stewed for several hours in a covered pot. We serve it with a simple and satisfying polenta.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our goal was simple: Take French onion soup and baked goat cheese salad and make stellar versions of these bistro favorites.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: A sticky bun should be neither dense nor bready, neither saturated with butter nor so sugary that it makes your heart race. The crumb should be tender and feathery and the sticky glaze gently chewy and gooey. Here's how we made ours.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Brownies are too often dull, and blondies (as well as congo bars, their coconut-flavored cousins) can be even worse, since they are even plainer. We decided to keep things simple while focusing on developing superior flavor and texture.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Cakes baked in Bundt and tube pans are popular for a variety of reasons. These pans make cakes that are especially attractive, and the cakes themselves tend to be pretty simple to prepare. In this episode, we make angel food and a chocolate Bundt cake.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Host Bridget Lancaster makes Easy Steak Frites, and Toni Tipton-Martin shares the origin of french fries. Equipment expert Adam Ried shares his top pick for braisers. Bryan Roof makes French Onion Soup.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Host Julia Collin Davison makes Old-Fashioned Chicken Noodle Soup, and Toni Tipton-Martin talks about the soup's restorative properties. Tasting expert Jack Bishop talks all about broths. Christie Morrison makes Beer-Batter Cheese Bread.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Host Bridget Lancaster makes Slow Roasted Salmon, and Toni Tipton-Martin discusses indigenous Alaskan fishing practices. Tasting expert Jack Bishop talks about leavening agents. Ashley Moore makes a show-stopping Clementine Cake.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Japanese Steakhouse Steak, Charred Cherry Tomatoes with Mozzarella; Cast Iron Skillets

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia cooks sheet-pan lemon-herb cod fillets with crispy garlic potatoes, green beans with cilantro sauce (mtsvane lobio kindzis satsebelit), and an easy summer berry cake.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia whips up simple pan-seared scallops, a delicious white bean-salami salad, and easy garlic and herb breadsticks.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia makes pan-seared strip steak with persillade sauce and a simple salad with make-ahead lemon-garlic-chive vinaigrette.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia cooks her favorite beef chili with black beans and chipotle, easy baked white rice, and watermelon-lime agua fresca.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We wanted to develop the perfect pumpkin cheesecake recipe, but we never figured it would take 30 cheesecakes to develop a great recipe worthy of the finest holiday dinner.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Watch as we take two modern classic desserts —a chocolate volcano cake and caramelized pears—and make them approachable for the home cook.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our hearty frittata is just as filling as an omelet, but a whole lot easier to prepare and serve. We also uncover the formula for the ideal quiche filling and deliver a tender, buttery pastry crust filled with moist, smooth custard.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we look at a few of our favorite Tex-Mex dishes: tomato salsa, quesadillas, and beef tacos.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen shows you how to make two hearty soups: black bean and tortilla.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: What could be more synonymous with fall than butternut squash? In this episode, we explore two main-course squash recipes: a creamy, comforting soup perfect for serving on a busy weeknight and a rich, hearty risotto suitable for entertaining.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We investigate inexpensive steaks and find out which were worth eating and how best to prepare them. We also take a look at a classic accompaniment to steak: mashed potatoes.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: When most people think of dishes like lasagna and jambalaya, they think of labor-intensive weekend meals. In this episode, however, we develop versions that could be prepared on a busy weeknight.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Two old-fashioned dishes with modern appeal: Boston baked beans and chicken and dumplings. Neither requires fancy ingredients or expensive equipment, just a little time and effort.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Margie Cooper and Mark Stacey continue their journey, from Sawbridgeworth in Hertfordshire to an auction in Chippenham, Wiltshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Its day four. Margie Cooper and Mark Stacey start the day in the New Forest in Hampshire ending at an auction showdown in Sherborne.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's all down to the last lot as Margie Cooper and Mark Stacey battle it out to from in Hele Exeter to Torquay for the final auction showdown.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Old-hand Thomas Plant and newbie Mark Hales take to the road, going head-to-head as they try and out-buy and out-sell each other. They start their journey in Portrush, Northern Ireland and end up for an auction in Belfast.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's game-on as Thomas Plant and Mark Hales travel from Dublin to Ballybrittas, Portlaoise, in the Republic of Ireland for an auction showdown

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's day three for Thomas Plant and Mark Hales as they battle for the biggest profit. Beginning in Ironbridge, Shropshire, they head to Froncysyllte in North Wales for the auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Thomas Plant and Mark Hales battle it out as they start the day in Newport Pembrokeshire and end up at auction showdown Llandeilo in Carmarthenshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the last day for Thomas Plant and Mark Hales. They begin in Hay-on-Wye and it's all down to the deciding auction in Pontrilas in Herefordshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's a fresh route for a new set of experts: Phil Serrell and Jonathan Pratt. Their first stop is Cockermouth in the Lake District, ending up in Kirkby Lonsdale for auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Phil Serrell and Jonathan Pratt continue their hunt for bargains starting in Corbridge and ending up with an auction showdown in Northallerton.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Phil Serrell has taken the lead as Jonathan Pratt struggles to find his form with antiques! They start day three in Darlington in the Tees valley and end up at auction in Doncaster.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Phillip Serrell has taken a commanding lead but Jonathan Pratt is determined to catch him up as they go into day four of their trip. Today they start buying in Gainsborough and end up in Lincoln for the auction showdown.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's Jonathan Pratt's last day to claw back some profit to try and catch the mighty Phil Serrell as they motor from Sheffield to auction in Wilmslow.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning and James Lewis take to the road as they go head-to-head to try and make the most profit from buying and selling antiques. They start their journey in Pateley Bridge, Yorkshire, and end up at the auction in Grimsby.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Items brought along include the first transatlantic airmail letter and a bronze figure.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team head for Burton Constable Hall near Hull.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team head to Caversham Park near Reading.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Photographs revealing the last days of the Russian royal family are brought for valuation.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Objects featured include a rare sapphire ring that changes colour in different light.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts head to Senate House, Britain's first skyscraper.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team head for the gardens of Trelissick near Truro in Cornwall.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Items featured include Walter Scott's walking cane and two very early cricket bats.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The experts inspect a ring containing a lock of Byron's hair and some postcards from 1916.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts visit the 18th-century cotton mill of New Lanark.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The experts examine some diamond jewels found hidden in an upholstered chair.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Items include a communion book once owned by Wilfred Owen and a vintage Aston Martin.

programme.title: Wild Caribbean
programme.desc: An exploration of the stunning underwater treasures of the Caribbean Sea, including the world's second largest barrier reef and countless shipwrecks.

programme.title: Seasonal Wonderlands
programme.desc: New England is the stage for the most incredible color change on earth, when the vivid greens of summer give way to the golds and reds of autumn.

programme.title: Seasonal Wonderlands
programme.desc: Svalbard in the Arctic spends many months of the year in complete darkness, an unrelenting frozen winter with temperatures down to 40 below Celsius.

programme.title: Seasonal Wonderlands
programme.desc: The Okavango Delta is a lush wetland of islands and lagoons in the middle of the vast, featureless Kalahari Desert.

programme.title: Big Bear Diary
programme.desc: Follow the trials and tribulations of North America's bears as they struggle to survive in an increasingly hostile world.

programme.title: Big Bear Diary
programme.desc: The conflict between black bear mothers Jeannie and Katie continue as Jeannie besieges Katie's two cubs in a tree; Brown bear mother Blondie and her three cubs make the most of carrion washed up by the sea.

programme.title: Big Bear Diary
programme.desc: Brown bear mum Blondie and her cubs were last seen fleeing from a pack of wolves. Have they survived? Both the black and polar bear families have trouble with marauding males.

programme.title: Snow Wolf Family and Me
programme.desc: Gordon Buchanan uses his skills as a wildlife cameraman to gain the trust of a white wolf family; as spring turns to summer, he becomes accepted by the pack, including mother Luna and her three newborn pups.

programme.title: Snow Wolf Family and Me
programme.desc: Gordon Buchanan reunites with his white wolf family as they try to raise their pups and prepare for winter; he walks with wolves as they hunt lemmings, muskox and hares and encounter a rival pack.

programme.title: Snow Wolf Family and Me
programme.desc: Gordon Buchanan's travels to the remote Canadian Arctic in search of wolves that have never seen people - wolves that have no fear of humans; using his skills as a wildlife cameraman Gordon begins to gain the trust of a white wolf family.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Wildlife and the environment.

programme.title: The Bear Family and Me
programme.desc: Gordon Buchanan must overcome his own fear, black bears have a dangerous reputation and attack more people than any other bear in the world, but once he meets Lily, a tolerant bear, mother of Hope, Gordon feels heartbroken.

programme.title: The Bear Family and Me
programme.desc: Summer arrives and Gordon finds out that Tiny the bear cub has been abandoned by her mother.

programme.title: The Bear Family and Me
programme.desc: It is autumn and Gordon finds out that Hope is back with her mother.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Road to Mexico
programme.desc: Rick enjoys a hearty steak and eggs American diner special and bids a fond farewell to his trusty Ford Mustang as he heads across what is reputed to be the busiest border crossing in the world.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Road to Mexico
programme.desc: Rick lands in the town that gave the world tequila and the metropolis that birthed mariachis and dishes like chilli con carne.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Road to Mexico
programme.desc: Rick Stein visits the Mexican capital to sample the Aztec cuisine.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Dish of the Day
programme.desc: Nigel shows ways to cook with an abundance of ingredients.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Dish of the Day
programme.desc: Nigel cooks haddock chowder, crumbed lamb steak with buttered Swede mash and fennel feta linguine.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Dish of the Day
programme.desc: Nigel introduces new flavor combinations that will reinvigorate our weekly shopping; ricotta beef burger, sesame seed salmon with miring and lemon and thyme cake.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Dish of the Day
programme.desc: Nigel cooks seven delicious dishes, including chicken and leek pie, mushroom medley and raspberry and cinnamon meringue.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Dish of the Day
programme.desc: Nigel demonstrates that sometimes simple cookery is the best; herby artichoke stew, chicken in cider and compost crumble.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Dish of the Day
programme.desc: Nigel offers butternut squash soup with crisps, rib ragout and cherry chocolate iced rice.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: In Moray at the Forres branch of Moray Coast Vets, veterinary surgeons Mark and Johanna, veterinary nurse Anna, and student veterinary nurse Kristin create cakes.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: At John Gillespie hairdressing salon in Perth, owner John, salon director Glen, creative director Fiona and colorist Rachel swap their scissors for scales and mixing bowls as they go head-to-head for the "Flour Power" trophy.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Private client solicitor Dara, senior solicitor Rachael and family solicitor Emma are joined by rookie cake-maker and document manager Jonny where they compete and bake against each other at Aberdeen law firm Ledingham Chalmers.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: The team visits the Bruichladdich distillery on the Hebridean island of Islay where four colleagues compete for the trophy.

programme.title: Flour Power

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Prominent British businessman Richard Branson visits Baywatch to perform several risky stunts, putting the lifeguards on high alert. Meanwhile, Mitch has to save one of Kaye's employees whose violent husband has come looking for her.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Hobie is thrilled when the “Johnny Danger Stunt Show" comes to the beach, but Mitch finds Johnny has questionable morals and is worried Hobie may follow his example. Matt is accused of sexual harassment by bad girl lifeguard Neely.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch considers a new career working with Garner as a private eye. Logan cheats on Caroline again. The explosion of an offshore oil rig endangers Stephanie, Cody, and Neely.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: As the crippled oil rig sinks and floods with water, Cody, Neely, and Stephanie begin a desperate rescue effort to save the two young couples, and themselves, until the Baywatch lifeguards can arrive to help.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Kaye Morgan asks Hobie to volunteer at a school for young blind children. Things take a dangerous turn when a huge brush fire traps Hobie and the blind children in the hills, and Mitch is the only one who can save them.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Caroline tries to stop her sister from making the worst mistake of her life. Cody and Neely rescue two surfers that fall ill due to a highly polluted beach. Mitch enlists the Beach Boys for a benefit concert to raise money to clean up the pollution.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch's mother arrives in town for a visit, and after some strange occurrences, he insists she sees a doctor. Meanwhile, Cody loses the motivation to continue his Olympic training and it is up to Stephanie to reinspire him.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Stephanie, CJ, and Caroline go on a girls-only junior lifeguard trip to Catalina which turns dire when two of the girls get trapped in a flooded cave. Meanwhile, a woman who dies in a car accident bequeaths an odd inheritance to Mitch…

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Hobie's new friend Isaac is an angry kid who will do anything to get his father's attention. His risky behavior is a problem for the lifeguards. Meanwhile, Caroline meets a jockey who has lost the will to race after an accident.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Logan borrows Cody's car without permission and has an accident, then lies to the police. Meanwhile, the Baywatch team settles an internal dispute with a paintball war and C.J. takes in an injured sea lion, causing problems with her roommates.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Matt Brody returns to Baywatch and ends up trapped on a yacht with Neely when a group of ruthless pirates takes hostages. Meanwhile, Joey's past may jeopardize her adoption by Mitch.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Logan and Caroline’s relationship hits a new low when Caroline returns his engagement ring, but things change when a baby is left in Logan’s possession. Meanwhile, Cody must overcome yet another setback to his Olympic career.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Caroline blames herself for a teen's death in a fiery nighttime boating accident and goes through Critical Incident Stress. Pushing everyone away, Caroline begins partying to distract from her guilt. Can the team help her recover from her PTSD?

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A mysterious, unseen creature begins attacking beachgoers, and it is up to the Baywatch team to find the creature. Meanwhile, Inside Sports Magazine wants a lifeguard for their swimsuit issue. Neely and Caroline compete for the cover.

programme.desc: Islam Mamedov takes on Brent Primus in this main card fight from Bellator 263!

programme.title: Best of Anatoly Tokov
programme.desc: Showcasing the best fights of Anatoly Tokov!

programme.title: Best of Brennan Ward
programme.desc: Showcasing the best fights of Brennan Ward!

programme.title: Bellator 138: Kimbo vs Shamrock
programme.desc: Bellator MMA presents a grudge match seven years in the making as Kimbo Slice finally meets Ken Shamrock. Patricio Pitbull goes to war with Daniel Weichel for the featherweight title. Plus WWE superstar Bobby Lashley and Michael Chandler return to action.

programme.title: Bellator 144: Halsey vs Carvalho
programme.desc: The middleweight title is on the line as Bellator MMA returns to Mohegan Sun with Rafael Carvalho vs. Brandon Halsey. And walking highlight reel Michael “MVP” Page is in action, along with submission specialist Goiti Yamauchi.

programme.title: Bellator 148: Daley vs Uhrich
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Fresno, California as feared knockout artist Paul Daley looks to make a highlight reel out of Andy Uhrich, while heavy-handed Patricky Pitbull aims to add another KO to his record when he takes on the son of an icon, Ryan Couture.

programme.title: Bellator 153: Koreshkov vs Henderson
programme.desc: Benson Henderson makes his Bellator debut against Champion Andrey Koreshkov.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to San Jose, California with a highly anticipated matchup be-tween King Mo and Phil Mr. Wonderful Davis. Also, hard-hitting lightweight Saad “The Assassin” Awad and submission ace Adam Piccolotti aim to impress.

programme.title: Bellator 158: Lima v Daley
programme.desc: Bellator MMA invades England as Paul Daley and Douglas Lima meet in a long-awaited showdown between welterweight knockout artists. And don’t miss Michael “MVP” Page as he looks to go viral against Cyborg Santos. Plus Matt Mitrione and James Gallagher!

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA invades Memphis as former middleweight champion Alexander Shlemenko takes on Kendall “Da Spyda” Grove. And WWE superstar Bobby Lashley looks to continue his winning ways against Josh Appelt in a battle of hard-hitting heavyweights.

programme.title: Bellator 164: Koreshkov vs Lima 2
programme.desc: Bellator MMA goes global as it emanates from Tel Aviv, Israel for a highly anticipated rematch between Andrey Koreshkov and Douglas Lima for the welterweight title in whats sure to be an action-packed main-event between two of the best in the world.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to the SAP Center in San Jose with a long awaited lightweight title showdown between champ Michael Chandler and Benson Henderson, and another pair of hard-hitting lightweights collide as Brandon Girtz faces off with Adam Piccolotti.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Actress Lindsay Lohan's mom, Dina, has been accused of being a bad mom, to riding the coattails of her daughter. Dina sets the record straight & reveals details inside her marriage to Michael. Plus, meet a woman who says Michael is her child's father.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Susan emailed Dr. Phil claiming she's at war with her son-in-law, David & daughter, Bekah. Susan is not sure why she's not allowed to see her grandchildren, but claims Bekah blames her "sinful behavior." Can Susan mend things to see her grandkids again?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Did Rebecca Zahau take her own life or foul play? Questions surrounding the woman's death have the family in search of answers. Attorney Anne Bremner & private investigator Paul Ciolino reveal possible evidence. Rebecca's sister Mary talks about her life.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Paula says her 19-year-old daughter, Kylie is on a path of self-destruction, but Kylie says Paula is at fault for being a bad role model. Who is telling the truth?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: David says he's in love with "Maria", a Christian woman from Texas with a $10 million inheritance. Even though they've never met, he's paid $25,000 to their lawyer to assist her in receiving her inheritance. Dr. Phil investigates "Maria": real or catfish?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Suzanne wrote Dr. Phil about her tumultuous relationship with her younger boyfriend. Ryan was first online friends with Suzanne’s twin sister, Michelle, who passed away, but left items to Ryan in her will, of which Suzanne is named executor. Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jon says he hates his selfish, untrustworthy dad, Jim, who works the holidays as Santa Claus! Then, pro-trainer Greg thinks he's on the show to talk health. Troy Dunn surprises him with his long-lost son! And 14-yr-old singing sensation Jackie Evancho!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Tammy and Paul wed for eight years until their marriage ended. After nine months apart the couple secretly remarried, unbeknownst to their families, who would not approve. Weeks after saying "I do" a second time, the two are having doubts of their own.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In a Dr. Phil first, a catfish who orchestrated several online dating deceptions faces her victims, in-studio. Plus, Ryan's ex-girlfriend, Holly, falsely accused him of posting intimate photographs & videos of her online after they broke up. Ryan speaks.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Brittany says boyfriend Tim is evil, abusive & unfaithful. Tim admits that he can't control his rage & choked Brittany while holding their 6-month-old daughter & says he fears he'll hurt the baby next. Tim confesses to cheating with both men and women.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In a gripping two-part series, Dr. Phil sits down with a family torn apart over accusations of the unthinkable. Melody says her 4-year-old granddaughter revealed that she was touched inappropriately by a man in a mask, and that the man was her daddy.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: With Nancy Grace, children's rights attorney Paul Mones & criminologist Dr. Denise Boots, Dr. Phil delves into the headlines: a starved & beaten teen escaping his torturers, an 8-year-old boy arrested for killing his father & two reporters found dead.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Marie says husband Ron has a violent temper & she fears her safety & of their 4-yr-old. She alleges Ron pushed her down the stairs & wrote "kill" on a bathroom mirror. Ron says Marie mixes her meds with alcohol. Dr. Phil cameras record the chaos at home.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Two survivors of abduction, Katie Beers and Sarah Maynard, share their stories in exclusive interviews with Dr. Phil. How did they survive their horrifying ordeals?

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, upcycling expert Sarah Teresinski is transforming items off the street that she found on the Stooping NYC Instagram page.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Preppy Kitchen: Recipes for Seasonal Dishes and Simple Pleasures" cookbook author John Kanell joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk for Drew's News: Food Edition.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up covering everything from the new freemium trend in dating apps to the grinch getting a horror makeover this Christmas to the great 1860 painting cellphone debate.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Bill Nye The Science Guy are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, Chef Pilar Valdes reveals five essential pantry items and turns them into a delicious dish.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Alaska Daily" star Hilary Swank joins Drew to chat. Plus, "Ghosts" stars Utkarsh Ambudkar is helping serve the news sunny-side up by joining Drew at the news desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: History of the World Part Two" StarIke Barinholtz is joins Drew and talks about how he met his wife in Las Vegas, his new show and more. Peloton Instructor Ally Love joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to serve the news sunny-side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Today" co-anchor Savannah Guthrie is serving the news sunny-side up with Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk and dishing on her new series "Princess Power." Aubrey Plaza stops by to chat about the follow-up to "The Return of the Christmas Witch.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: In an all-new Drew Gooder Drew has a big surprise in store for Deloris "NuNu" and Patrick "PopPop" Hogan who run a safe and reliable 24-hour daycare to help the parents in their community.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Jennette McCurdy, author of the best-selling memoir, "I'm Glad My Mom Died," has a very honest and revealing conversation with Drew.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up covering the one thing Drake regrets about his rap career and how long experts say it takes to decide if you're attracted to someone.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Kiera Knightley and Carrie Coon join Drew to talk about their upcoming film, "Boston Strangler."Drew and her co-pilotRoss Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Kerry Washington stars in an all-new comedy show, 'UnPrisoned' by creator Tracy McMillan, and they're joining Drew to dish all about the new series.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Celebrity interior designer Mikel Welch joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to tackle the latest design headlines including gnome mania, interior designers doubling as marriage counselors, the Biophilic design trend and more.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Woman King" star John Boyega stops by to chat and roller skate with Drew. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Plus, In A Minute Bill Nye shares his 60 second experiment.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Tony Dokoupil joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to hit the headlines! James Beard Award-winning author Tamar Adler joins Drew andTonyDokoupil in the kitchen to serve up something delicious.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Your Place or Mine" star Tig Notaro is telling Drew about working with Reese Witherspoon on their new film and the latest season of "The Morning Show.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Entertainment Tonight's Kevin Frazier and Nischelle Turner are joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk for a special Oscars themed Drew's News, sharing their predictions for the awards show.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Jessica Biel tells Drew about dog sledding and plays "The Real Biel" trivia. Derek Blasberg joins Drew and Ross to cover news, including Dolly Parton's award and throwback fashion.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up and covering headlines like the woman who tweeted the unusual snack her fellow plane passenger whipped out and the new device that allows lovers to kiss virtually.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew interviews President Joe Biden and First Lady Jill Biden, discussing their relationship and Christmas traditions. FLOTUS gives a tour of the White House Christmas Decorations.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathewsare covering the news including headlines like the study that found mammals who have friends live longer and the ice cream shop in D.C. serving everyone, even those who can't pay! Pilar Valdesis back with a new Pro Tips with Pilar.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: We're celebrating the Oscars and style sheriffs Melissa Rivers, Law Roach and Christian Siriano are joining Drew and Ross Mathews for a special fashion panel.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Tamera Mowry Housley opens up about sharing her spicy to-do list with her husband in her new memoir, "You Should Sit Down For This!," the possibility of a "Sister, Sister" reboot and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Senator Bernie Sanders is joining Drew to chat about his new book. He's also joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to discuss local Vermont headlines and share some of his favorite Vermont-based small businesses.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew, Ross Mathews & Brooke Shields report a 60yo joining a pop punk band & the new hickey trend. Later, Drew & Brooke cook brown butter bowtie pasta.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: CBS Mornings" co-host Gayle King is joining Drew and Ross Mathews to hit the headlines, covering topics like the woman who found an unusual way to calm her nerves before a first kiss.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants to leave sunny California because she misses winter, sending Mr. Drysdale into a panic. The banker enlists Miss Jane in an elaborate scheme to convince the Clampetts that a blizzard has occurred.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The last televised wrestling match was such a success that the promoter wants a rematch. Granny isn't interested until Rebecca's parents visit.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny is worried about Miss Jane's spinsterhood and convinces Jethro to ask her to marry him. Granny assures him that she will decline the proposal, but Hathaway accepts, leading to panic in the Clampett household.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny is on the warpath concerning the chaos caused by Ellie's critters and declares either they go or she does. Mr. Drysdale is equally irritated by the expense of his wife's poodle. Jed tries to find a solution.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny and Jethro believe they have psychic abilities, but Granny's predictions stop coming true. With her reputation on the line, she picks a stock for Mr. Drysdale that could cost him a small fortune.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Heading to England, Jethro smuggles Ellie's turkey buzzard on the plane upsetting Mr. Drysdale and a fellow passenger. After landing, they try to meet with the Queen to give her their 80 million dollars. Their butler Faversham tries to clear things up.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After the Clampetts return from London, Granny gets a letter from Hooterville asking her to help with Betty Jo Elliot's baby.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: While Granny is away in Hooterville, Mr. Drysdale hires a gorgeous Italian cook who speaks no English.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny and the Italian chef compete to see who will cook for the family.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts spend Thanksgiving in Hooterville.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale casts Dash Riprock as Homer Noodleman, a potential new lover for Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro wants a new identity with the replacement of their old truck with a modern hot rod. Granny wants to stay with the old truck. To prove how good the old truck is, Granny races Jethro in his hot rod.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts prepare to go to Hooterville for Christmas.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale follows the Clampetts and Miss Jane to Hooterville where they are spending Christmas. He takes Ellie's bear Fairchild with him and gets himself thrown in jail in a little town. Sam Drucker shows up to help.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale is sick, and Dr. Granny springs into action with a chimp as a nurse. But Ellie's bear Fairchild has taken a liking to granny's flu remedy. During this, Mrs. Drysdale tries to impress society Mrs. Van Ransonhoff.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is evicted because his 50 cent allowance won't cover the rent. The other Clampetts take over the space with Granny will cut hair or pull teeth. Jed will sharpen tools and whittle something. Ellie is the pretty receptionist.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: With the Clampetts established in business in Jethro's vacated office space, a building inspector visits to find out about their business operations on the 5th floor.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale hires a troubleshooter for the bank. His main mission is to get the Clampetts to close their business operating out of the 5th floor.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Sam Drucker comes to Beverly Hills to visit, and Granny assumes he's interested in courting her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro meets Mrs. Drysdale's guru and decides he wants to be one also. Granny thinks it's all nonsense, but when she tries to put a stop to it the followers find her common sense inspiring and make her the head guru.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Drysdales now jog so the banker can get the account of Jason Detweiler, head of a running club. The Clampetts don't understand the concept, leading to misunderstandings, then Ellie and Jethro become enthusiastic.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Famous singer Pat Boone is in the neighborhood and smells Granny's cooking. He wanders into their backyard and the Clampetts befriend him, thinking he's a hill country man down on his luck.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbillies move back to the hills to find Elly May a husband, much to the dismay of banker Drysdale.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts arrive in the mountain town of Silver Dollar City, where Granny starts a feud with an old rival, Elverna Bradshaw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny continues her efforts to get Elly May married, extolling the young girl's virtues to every bachelor she meets.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Bird watcher Jane Hathaway hikes into the woods and finds a man for Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts rehearse for Elly May's wedding to backwoodsman Matthew Templeton, unaware that banker Drysdale wants it stopped.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Tonight, the house guests have been in the BB motel for 9 days. Emotions are high, and a shocking announcement changes the course of the game. Plus, the battle for power begins again!

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Tonight will the Southerner be side lined, or will she compete? And who will devour power at the messiest fest yet. Plus two houseguests will hit the block.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Things get fishy at a mer-tastic veto competition. Who will win the golden power, and will it be used to save either Pooch or Taylor?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Following a live vote, a houseguest is evicted and interviewed; remaining houseguests compete for power in the next head of household.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Will the power of veto save Michael and Brittany from the block? Plus escalating tensions set off a chain of events that will turn the whole game upside down.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Will it be a double serving of blindsides courtesy of the Leftovers? First the veto meeting, then the live eviction!

programme.title: Big Brother

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Things get trippy in the veto competition. Who will win the golden power, and will it lead to another shocking veto meeting?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Earning the Head of Household will be no walk in the park for the final 12, and another set of besties are block bound. Plus it's the muffin mystery that broke the internet.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: OTEV is back! Who will capture the veto at the Stage Roach Festival, and will it be used to save the besties on the block? Plus Muffin Gate rocked the whole world, and tonight the saga continues.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Either Daniel or Kyle will be the final non-juror sent packing. Plus, with the Festie Bestie twist ending, who will overcome the legendary BB wall competition?

programme.desc: Who will conquer conspiracy fast and emerge with power? Will the Leftovers continue to dominate, or will someone new turn the house upside down? Plus a new showmance begins to blossom.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando los motivos de un atentado contra una técnica de explosivos la relacionan con un asesinato, el equipo del NCIS investiga su muy reservada vida personal.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando el cadáver de un oficial estadounidense se relaciona con un buque de la Marina británica, el asesinato se convierte en un incidente internacional.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC viaja a Arizona a investigar una serie de crímenes metódicos ocurridos a mujeres, el final es desconcertante. Dentro del equipo también se vive incertidumbre porque Hotch puede ser el remplazo de Strauss quien murió en la temporada pasada.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC sigue en Arizona investigando acerca de la vida familiar del sospechoso, el cual tenía un gemelo idéntico, pero la madre nunca se lo dijo a la policía.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un francotirador dispara en Dallas, la BAU investiga si el próximo aniversario del asesinato de Kennedy es un factor de motivación, pero descubrirán que en realidad va a matar la mujer de quien lo contrato.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC conoce a su nuevo jefe, Mateo Cruz, un antiguo conocido de JJ. Cruz se une al equipo mientras peinan las calles de Baltimore en busca de un sospechoso que deja a las víctimas incapaces de comunicarse.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Buen policía, mal policía
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de una anciana por una bala perdida. Mientras, Frank es ridiculizado por disciplinar a un policía irrespetuoso y Erin ayuda a su detective Anthony.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Por la comunidad
programme.desc: Erin y Anthony intentan evitar la deportación de la activista comunitaria Coryna Garza (Judy Reyes), quien no es ciudadana, y Frank debe decidir si el NYPD participará en la redada de alto perfil de los Marshals de EE. UU. contra una pandilla local.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El delator
programme.desc: Mientras Frank se enfrenta a un denunciante de la policía de Nueva York que afirma tener pruebas de abuso de poder en la organización, Danny y Báez investigan el caso de una mujer que fue atropellada por un coche en circunstancias sospechosas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Culpable por asociación
programme.desc: Cuando un testigo clave en el caso de Danny es asesinado justo antes de testificar, Erin enfurece a Danny al pedirle ayuda a Anthony (Steve Schrippa) para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando el cadáver de un oficial estadounidense se relaciona con un buque de la Marina británica, el asesinato se convierte en un incidente internacional.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando un controvertido DJ y un oficial de la Marina son asesinados a tiros, el equipo descubre un siniestro plan.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Adentrándose en la mente de una brillante científica naval, Abby se obsesiona con resolver su asesinato, mientras que la última aventura de DiNozzo conduce a un interesante Halloween.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El padre de Dinozzo regresa, desempeñando un papel vital en la investigación de un asesinato que podría tener resultados catastróficos.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: In the first annual Run for a Million in Las Vegas, the riders compete for the first-ever million-dollar purse in horse-reining history.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: The top trainers in the sport of horse reining dial up the heat in Arizona as they try to qualify for this year's Run For A Million -- giving them a shot at the largest purse in the history of the sport.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: With the final qualifiers selected for this year's Run For A Million, it's back to the ranches as the McCutcheon dynasty gets back to business. After missing the qualifier, Abby Lengel must begin the process of trying to get back into the competition.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: Andrea, Matt, and Craig share the struggles and joys of the sport they love while training some of the next generation's brightest reining stars -- their children.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: The competitors test their best Run For A Million prospects at the NRBC in Katy, TX. Some riders are sliding away with big checks while others are realizing they might not have the caliber of horse they will need to take the top prize in Vegas.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: With the Run for a Million just around the corner, the top riders meet at the NHRA Derby for one final test before Vegas. The underdogs are out to prove they are a force to be reckoned with against the top contenders.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: The moment has finally arrived as the sport's best riders gather in Vegas with their eyes on the top prize. The excitement and tension are high as these riders know that one perfect ride could change their lives forever.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of eager hopefuls -- ranging from starry-eyed rookies to experienced NFL cheerleaders -- gather at AT&T Stadium for a shot at joining the world's most famous squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 125 remaining hopefuls must nail a choreographed routine before advancing to the final rounds, and the DCC veterans reveal their plans for the future.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: A former Laker Girl who survived the Las Vegas shooting chases her dream, and the women work on their solo presentations and interviews as finals approach.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The returning veterans travel to the Bahamas to shoot the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders swimsuit calendar, and the rookies feel the pressure as training camp begins.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The first-year hopefuls get new looks on Rookie Makeover Day, DCC alumni give the candidates feedback, and Cowboys' Head Coach Jason Garrett stops by during a rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Before Kelli and Judy make roster cuts, the rookies learn the famed kickline and jump splits, get fitted for the iconic uniform and face Jay Johnson's power squad training.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Emmy-winning choreographer Travis Wall tests the hopefuls' contemporary dance skills, Kelli and Judy make show group selections, and Melissa Rycroft teaches injury prevention.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car chase ends when a driver foot bails at a restaurant. A nervous female driver blows smoke at Deputies and refuses to exit her truck. A domestic violence suspect talks in circles when questioned.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers review dashcam footage after a suspect claims force was used against him unjustly, and a weed enthusiast drops some knowledge on police about the founding fathers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies gradually get to the bottom of a possible stolen vehicle. A woman asks the police to help her make a clean break from bad habits. A single woman tries to plan a date with an online suitor, but the night quickly goes awry.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man tries to escape on foot after driving without a license, two friends hide meth in plain sight, and an intoxicated man is caught peering into a restaurant after hours.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a highspeed pursuit of a stolen vehicle. Police contact the Fire Department and alert the guests when they spot a motel fire. Officers pursue a suspect on a stolen motorcycle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An out-of-control woman needs to be subdued after an arrest. Deputies spot an erratic driver who appears to be under the influence. A car is seen being driven backwards on a one-way street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy tries to level with a man who’s struggled with addiction for a decade. Security guards at an aquarium warn officers about a man with a gun. A masked-up cyclist has no luck out-pedaling the officer on his tail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man gets busted during a drug deal, a cyclist gets confused when an officer finds narcotics in his pants, and officers respond to reports of gunfire.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: When one of the officers attempts to grab a suspect, the suspect unexpectedly assaults the officer in an attempt to avoid arrest. An officer responds to a stabbing. An officer is flagged down by a concerned group looking for a missing child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect is arrested after officers find a loaded gun during a routine search. Two men are detained after suspected of battery. During Mardi Gras officers arrest a man pickpocketing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female victim tells the officers that two men kicked in her front door. Three suspects attempt to steal a bicycle in an alley. Following routine questioning of a petrified wife, officer arrests the husband for domestic abuse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A jaywalking citation escalates to resisting arrest, an SUV contains more needles than one officer is willing to deal with, and a lovers' spat draws the attention of a patrol.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen car and its occupants roll into a canal and are fished out by Deputies. A shoplifting trio is caught with stolen goods. A trip to the mechanic ends in an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is questioned for assaulting a woman on a train. A man is arrested for burglarizing a casino, he initially denies the charges but surveillance footage corroborates. A father kicks his son out of the house after his drinking becomes problematic.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A boyfriend fights a man who’s just groped his girlfriend. Police make several drug related arrests while patrolling the streets of New Orleans on a particularly raucous evening. An adventurous suspect is arrested while scaling down a drainpipe.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect on a stolen motorcycle is apprehended with the assistance of the K-9 unit. An Officer responds to a domestic disturbance call after a woman "accidentally" stabs her boyfriend. A hazardous meth lab is busted.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers apprehend a man in possession of stolen property brandishing a rifle. Officers respond to a call of brothers in a fist fight. Police intervene when a couple argues in the middle of the street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Fort Bend, Texas deputies arrest a man for possession of a crack pipe, and Michigan and Washington police both respond to domestic violence situations.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies assist an injured woman who vows revenge on her male attackers. A woman tells deputies her husband beat her in front of their children. Officers protect an elderly woman from an abusive child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers split up to interrogate two men suspected of stealing a pick-up truck, a motorist tries to ditch a bag of meth, and police discover a bunch of syringes in a vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers try to calm an agitated and disoriented man before he hurts himself or someone else, and a driver going 2 MPH on a highway catches the attention of a patrol car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man assaults his sister and her dog, a gibberish-speaking man is arrested for attacking his neighbors, and a couple with no-contact orders tells conflicting stories.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A distressed woman leads the cops to her abusive fiance, and a couple of officers are suspicious when they pull over an overly friendly man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man suspected of shoplifting attempts to ditch his clothes, and officers respond to a dispute between a shopkeeper and a man suspected of paying with counterfeit money.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man on a motorcycle evades an officer, a woman in a suspicious vehicle accrues multiple charges, and a traffic stop reveals two men under the influence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers spot a suspected stolen vehicle and a pursuit ensues. Officers are called to a fight at a bar over a tossed drink. Police are called to the scene of two intoxicated siblings arguing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist tries to bolt when questioned by police, a deputy uses a cotton swab to procure evidence from a suspect's mouth, and an unmowed lawn triggers a domestic disturbance.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston continues to search for a young girl taken hostage as part of a human trafficking operation.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: An unusual piece of evidence revealed during a bowling tournament brings the CSIs to intestigate a murder at a bowling alley.

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A major shootout at a gun store may be connected to the death of a young woman involved in a suicide pact.

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team delves into the world of professional golf when the body of a legendary player is discovered during a high-profile tournament.

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Rascal Flatts takes center stage when a band member is electrocuted by his own guitar during a concert, the CSI team investigates if it was a case of foul play.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a young boy is found murdered, the CSI team uncovers evidence that may link his death to an old case that recently resurfaced.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine and Detective Vartann are thrown together in a hotel room for 24 hours as they stake out a duo making drugs in the room next door.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team investigates the brutal murder of a family, they trace the killer to the house next door, which might belong to the "Dr. Jekyll" serial killer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When Hodges and Wendy take a group of high school CSI Explorer Scouts on a field trip, they embellish their role in solving cases and take their assignment a little bit too far.

programme.title: CSI

programme.desc: Un asesino en serie se burla del equipo de CSI dejándole pistas crípticas y cuanto más tarden en decodificar estos acertijos, mayor será la cantidad de muertos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Jo balances personal and professional challenges when her adopted daughter, Ellie, is the key witness in a murder investigation.

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When the body of a beautiful young woman is found in a stolen Ferrari, the investigation leads to a family of car thieves.

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: As the CSI New York team investigates the assassination of a judge. Jo comes face to face with a criminal from her past.

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: New York: La casa de la muerte (S6 Ep 10)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York realiza un seguimiento de una llamada a Emergencias que lo lleva a un ático vacío, pero encuentra un cadáver de casi 100 años y una casa con trampas explosivas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Segundas oportunidades (S6 Ep 11)
programme.desc: Encuentran a un drogadicto rehabilitado muerto en un callejón y el equipo de CSI de Nueva York descubre que él fue víctima de un complot premeditado.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Justicia criminal (S6 Ep 12)
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI investiga un brutal apuñalamiento, descubre que se colocaron pruebas en la escena del crimen y eso los enfrenta a un colega de confianza.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Castigo en el juego (S6 Ep 13)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran a una hermosa mariscal de campo, estrella de la liga femenina, asesinada en un jacuzzi, llaman al equipo de CSI para que descubra quién la quería muerta.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Amor sanguíneo (S6 Ep 14)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran a una mujer joven muerta en el Central Park, el equipo de CSI de Nueva York es atraído hacia la misteriosa subcultura del vampirismo.

programme.title: CSI: New York: La fórmula (S6 Ep 15)
programme.desc: Cuando una leyenda de las carreras de autos muere en una feroz explosión, el equipo de CSI de Nueva York descubre que la causa es una alteración en el auto.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El reinando de la incertidumbre (S6 Ep16)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran a cuatro víctimas muertas en una habitación de hotel y el principal sospechoso aparece empuñando un hacha, el equipo de CSI intenta reconstruir los detalles.

programme.title: CSI: New York: La olla de oro (S6 Ep 17)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran a dos jóvenes periodistas muertos en la víspera del Día de San Patricio, el equipo de CSI intenta encontrar la pista al final del arco iris.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Descansa en paz, Marina Garito (S6 Ep18)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerta a una mujer, la evidencia y la autopsia sugieren suicidio, pero Stella no está convencida y arriesga su vida para continuar con el caso.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Redención (S6 Ep19)

programme.title: CSI: New York: Sospechosos inesperados (S6 Ep20)

programme.title: CSI: New York: Desde el subsuelo (S6 Ep21)
