programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Everyone's got a problem with David McLane after last week's Championship Challenge Match. David placates the angry roster by offering all participants a chance at the new champion - who's more than willing to face each of them.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After two groundbreaking wins, Champion Abilene Maverick finally re-introduces herself to the WOW audience. Backstage, as teams start to assemble for The WOW Trios Tournament, Team Spirit has a major announcement with major ramifications.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With Amber O'Neal by her side, Jessie Jones makes her intentions towards former tag partner Americana crystal clear. With Amber by her side, however, Jessie might just provoke another former WOW Superhero to step up. Gloria Glitter aims to make a stance.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Lana Star and The Fab Four aim to be back on top with the gold this week in Penelope Pink's Main Event Championship Match against WOW Champion Abilene Maverick.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The WOW Trios Tournament officially kicks off as Team Spirit and Team IQ Superior both look to pick up the first win and advance.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The next Tag Team Championship Match is on everybody's minds as The Tonga Twins set up a Fatal Four Way Main Event to determine their next challenger. The Trios Tournament continues as Stephy Slays and The Mighty Mights face a fractured Team Exile.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: There's no stopping Americana as she challenges Jessie Jones to a one-on-one contest in The Main Event, despite concerns from Santana Garrett. The Brat Pack is joined by an intriguing third member as they enter the first round of the Trios Tournament.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Last Call demands a championship match against The Tonga Twins. Las Bandidas and Tormenta hope that Latin Power can stand tall in their first trios tournament match against The Mighty Mights and Keta Rush.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's finally time for Princess Aussie's singles match against WOW World Champion Abilene Maverick as the Australian tries to prove that she'll never give up chasing her dream.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Coach Campanelli addresses the fallout from last week's Trios Tournament Match, and Team Spirit's path forward as the tournament continues with Tormenta and Las Bandidas facing Team Exile in the next semi final match.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Fab Four are incensed to find out that because of their constant attacks on The Mother Truckers, David McLane has granted Big Rig Betty and Holly Swag a Main Event tag team match against Penelope Pink and Vickie Lynn McCoy.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jessie Jones and Amber O'Neal have a new look, but it's make or break for The All American Girls as they call their shot against them for the Main Event.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The VIP Abilene Maverick is firmly in The Beast's crosshairs as The Beast finally gets the rematch she's been waiting on for weeks, and a chance to reclaim the WOW World Championship that she never lost.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Beast demands justice after taking a loss in the WOW World Championship Match in the last episode of WOW.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When Randall has a sheriff bed a prisoner, the man's gang kidnaps the sheriff and two others and threatens to kill one per day until the man is freed.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: In Mexico, Josh is hired to protect a sensible man and his pregnant wife from his father-in-law and the villagers who are angered when he refuses the town healing woman or \\"witch\\".

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: After Josh reluctantly takes the task of finding a man and his wife's pet ewe, he becomes the butt of many jokes in the community while cattlemen nearly hang him when he mentions sheep.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When a convicted killer escapes prison, Josh is hired for $500 to protect the woman whose testimony put him there.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh rides into a town looking for a man who asked him to come there for a job that pays $500.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is hired by Harry Weaver to track down his twin brother Pete, who's wanted with a $500 bounty on him.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is called in to track down a new outlaw - the local sheriff who is a friend.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh reluctantly takes a job protecting a beautiful deaf, mute, teenage girl and keeping everyone off the father's place for a day or two.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh escorts an East Coast photographer to take a picture of his friend El Gato (The Cat), who is a famous, hilarious bandit living in the hills of Mexico with a small army.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A broke Josh is hired by a fearful man to help him elope with his sweetheart, Jane, the daughter of a local rancher.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh takes a job for $200 protecting an express office employee who stole $10,000 and wants to return it before it's discovered missing.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A Japanese woman travels to the U.S. to find an American man who proposed to her in Japan and hires Josh to find him since no one will help her in her search.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh arrives in town thinking the sheriff summoned him to go after a man.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh rides to Barney Durant's horse business to rent a couple of horses right after Barney pushes his son David to leave.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: While pursuing Carl Martin, Josh stops at a marshal's office where Carl is being held.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When phony wanted posters put a price on the head of a retired Confederate officer, Colonel Sykes' daughter summons Josh Randall to help keep the bounty hunters at bay.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A reclusive old man with an Apache bodyguard is wanted for a crime committed long ago.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A ranch manager hires Randall to bring back a line rider charged with grand theft.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is rooked into advancing half the bounty to a man who promises to lead him to the wanted criminal Shawnee Bill, but Bill may be closer than Randall thinks.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A banker with a consuming thirst for vengeance hires Randall to accompany him to track down the man he believes responsible for his son's death and a bank robbery.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is deputized to transport a ruthless killer to Tucson but exchanges him for the nun kidnapped by the killer's gang.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall brings a suspected murderer to Pot Hole but fears the man won't receive a fair trial when he finds the townspeople in the grip of a power-mad bully.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When Josh, as a favor to a friend, escorts a beautiful woman to a trial that could see her hang for killing her husband, her lover, and a foreman, she charms him to convince her of her innocenences.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is asked by Stacy Torrance for help when she finds a wanted poster under her door - for her for murder.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Owing a favor to a sheriff, Josh agrees against better judgment to go to the lawless town of Bent Horn to bring back a man wanted for bank robbery and murder.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh sets out to help a heartbroken wife locate her missing husband, but his mission of mercy meets with a resistant and tight-lipped townspeople.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is bushwhacked by bounty hunters in cahoots with the local sheriff, who now must keep Josh from blowing the whistle on their illegal but lucrative \\"bounty game\\".

channel.display-name: Warner Bros. TV Say Yes to the Dress

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Lauren is in love with a dress that will blow her budget to shreds; Shoshana is paying for her own dress to complete her special day; Sara is over budget and must convince her father the dress is worth the money.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Randy gives back to Iraq and Afghanistan War veteran Alicia by surprising the shocked bride with a day at Kleinfeld; brides Margo, Brenda and Amy all struggle to get their sisters' approval.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Bride Margo struggles to get her twin sister's approval of her dresses; Brenda needs all four of her sisters to agree with her dress choice; Amy worries her twin sister will think her dress is too revealing.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Bride Lauren loves dressing sexy, but she wants a gown that still feels bridal; Ali wants to look like Beyoncé on her big day, and needs a dress with tons of sparkle; Blair hopes her grandmother approves of her sexy dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Paralympic snowboarder Amy Purdy, not afraid to take risks, waits until three weeks before her wedding to find a dress; Katie brings a list ranking her top gowns; Lori hopes her dress fits for her wedding in 9 days.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Southern bride Danielle gets some help from her girlfriends to find the perfect glamorous gown; Jen wants a traditional dress for her beer-themed wedding; Katie worries that her large assets won't fit in her wedding gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Sharde dreams of a colorful dress to suit her rainbow unicorn wedding; bride Spencer wants a very avant-garde and dramatic gown for her big day; Sarah is shocked when the scissors come out during her fitting appointment.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Krystle loves attention, but her friends have reservations about her over-the-top dress; Maria shocks her pastor father with a sexy sheer bodice; only Pnina can help Jaclyn when she faces a major dress dilemma.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Alyssa's father rules the day with his opinions; wedding planner Michelle feels extra pressure to find the perfect dress; when Emily's custom Pnina gown is all wrong, her dad demands a solution.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Amanda needs to find a dress both she and her opinionated grandmother love; Hillary searches for a specific gown that her late grandmother adored; Macie has found her dream dress, but her grandmother wants her to try something different.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Country musician Kristian Bush helps his friend Evyn find the perfect dress; 70 gowns later, Chelsea struggles with dress overload; Melanie worries that her dress won't fit.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Joelle tries on her mother's 1987 Kleinfeld dress; Randy and Antonella have a rough appointment with bride LeAnne, a Kleinfeld legacy, who declares she's an anti-bride.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Wedding planner Rachel excitedly tries on edgy dresses; Natalie wants a unique gown, but her traditional mom may not approve; Kleinfeld employee Subrina hopes her customized dress will match her vision.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Bridget's opinionated entourage makes her rethink her feelings about the dress for her wedding to pro snowboarder Scott Lago; new mom Karyssa wants a dress with lots of coverage; Lauren hopes she fits into her gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Bride Jenna is joined by her brother, NFL player Justin Pugh; Talmesha wants a gown that will compliment a special bouquet honoring her late father; Denise worries when the scissors come out.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Catching up with three exceptional brides to see where they are now: "Good Morning America's" Ginger Zee, Boston Marathon bombing survivor Rebekah, and rock 'n' roller Chic.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Randy discovers major changes at Kleinfeld, including the hiring of the first male consultant; bride Tolu contends with her opinionated sister; Amanda thinks her gown won't be modest enough for her orthodox wedding.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: New consultant Shay is excited to help with a surprise marriage proposal, but he rejects Randy's offer to help; former Miss USA Nia Sanchez has just one day to find her gown; comedian Jamie learns that dress shopping is no laughing matter.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: When Grammy-nominated rocker Elle King arrives, Randy and Shay have a dress disagreement; bride Lisa needs a gown for a wedding with dolphins.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Jamiee and fiancée Lisa are shopping together, and to keep the brides from seeing each other's looks, the consultants plan a wild surprise; wedding planner Michelle tries to let go and enjoy being the bride; Shay confronts Randy.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Randy's mom visits for her 93rd birthday, and she's happy to share her fiery opinions with everyone; timid bride Courtney's appointment gets hijacked by her provocative mother; Katie needs a gown suitable for two big secrets.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Bodybuilder Melissa needs a dress that shows off her muscles; Shay loses his cool with Randy as they help Kat, a bride with a tight budget;.Jasmine wants a unique bridal look to match her one-of-a-kind wedding on top of the Grand Canyon.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Bride Jennifer arrives at Kleinfeld with her fiancé and his wife; Glori only wants the trendiest of gowns straight off the runway; Amanda needs to leave with a dress today for her wedding inside a chapel made of ice.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Bodybuilder Melissa needs a dress that shows off her muscles; Shay loses his cool with Randy as they help Kat, a bride with a tight budget;.Jasmine wants a unique bridal look to match her one-of-a-kind wedding on top of the Grand Canyon.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Arlicia is letting her opinionated sisters plan her entire wedding, which includes choosing her dress; Ameena has an unlimited budget and bridezilla tendencies; Karen is especially thankful to be shopping after nearly losing her fiancé.

programme.title: Halloween Wars
programme.desc: The final two teams face off in one last epic showdown; the team that can best illustrate a terrifying worldwide outbreak and the race for an antidote will be crowned the champions; actress and horror culture icon LeeAnna Vamp serves as guest judge.

programme.title: Halloween Wars
programme.desc: Skilled artists vie for a spot in the biggest Halloween competition around.

programme.title: Halloween Wars
programme.desc: Six teams create mind-blowing and yummy Halloween-themed displays that depict the horror of being trapped in a nightmare and unable to wake up.

programme.title: Halloween Wars
programme.desc: Five teams create amazing and tasty Halloween-themed displays that mix fear and romance in a depiction of a zombie dating show.

programme.title: Halloween Wars
programme.desc: Four teams made up of an expert pumpkin carver, a cake artist and a sugar master go into battle to imagine their most terrifyingly tasty displays yet: an attack by a swarm.

programme.title: Halloween Wars
programme.desc: The teams create displays that show how well-known holiday mascots like Santa and the Easter Bunny go trick-or-treating.

programme.title: Halloween Wars
programme.desc: The final two teams, made up of an expert pumpkin carver, a cake artist and a sugar master, face off in an epic showdown; actor Caleb McLaughlin ("Stranger Things") serves as a guest judge.

programme.title: Halloween Wars
programme.desc: Eighteen of the best pumpkin carvers and cake and sugar artists are looking to join the battle; they all hope they have what it takes to be chosen to compete.

programme.title: Halloween Wars
programme.desc: Six teams consisting of an expert pumpkin carver, a cake artist and a sugar master dive into the first challenge: creating spookily delicious displays of Halloween haunts taking a monster road trip; actor Jeremy Ray Taylor guest judges.

programme.title: Halloween Wars
programme.desc: The five remaining teams -- an expert pumpkin carver, a cake artist and a sugar master -- are challenged to show there's nothing scarier than dating as they create their scariest visions of a blind date; Guillermo Diaz joins the judging panel.

programme.title: Halloween Wars
programme.desc: The four remaining teams are challenged to create astonishing and delectable Halloween-themed displays showing that even the scariest monsters need friends, too; actress Katie Sarife joins the judges to pick the winning team.

programme.title: Halloween Wars
programme.desc: The three teams are tasked with creating stunning and scrumptious Halloween-themed displays showing the claustrophobic terror that results when someone is trapped with a monster; actress Jocelin Donahue joins the judges to choose the final two teams.

programme.title: Halloween Wars
programme.desc: In the final challenge, the team that best captures the terror and fun of the ultimate horror movie jump scare moment will be crowned the champions.

programme.title: Outrageous Pumpkins
programme.desc: Seven carvers must master the classic jack-o'-lantern; in the Quick Carve round, the competitors depict the struggle between good and evil; in the Big Carve round, each competitor is given one of the seven deadly sins to inspire their masterpiece.

programme.title: Outrageous Pumpkins
programme.desc: Six pumpkin carvers tackle 3D sculpting challenges, starting with science experiments gone wrong in the Quick Carve round; things heat up in the Big Carve round when the competitors incorporate fire in 3D dioramas of trick-or-treating pumpkins.

programme.title: Outrageous Pumpkins
programme.desc: Five expert pumpkin carvers face a spooky structures challenge; the carvers stack pumpkins to create undead animals in a pet cemetery-themed Quick Carve round before moving on to make enormous prehistoric creatures in the Big Carve round.

programme.title: Outrageous Pumpkins
programme.desc: The final four pumpkin carvers create terrifying monsters-in-law and larger-than-life monster party scenes using Atlantic Giant pumpkins; the winning carver will take home the $25,000 prize and bragging rights.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: An assassin is in Dallas to kill an ambassador. A Russian agent who has been tracking the assassin for 25 years asks Walker to help with the capture and prevent the murder.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker tells children a Christmas story about a Texas Ranger from 1876. Hayes Cooper was said to have no Christmas spirit. In 1876, a baby was kidnapped and Haynes was assigned the case. At last, he found the baby and Christmas spirit.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Cousin Beauregard Maverick -- Beau -- returns after five years. Beau takes a job impersonating the son of a wealthy man and does so well that Bret must soon rescue him.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Bart must bring to justice a corrupt, comical sheriff (EDGAR BUCHANAN) who is dead serious about killing him. Also guest starring George Kennedy and Edd Byrnes.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: When Beau wins the town of Silver Hill in a poker game, he finds it's atop a worthless mine, and a railroad agent is trying to cheat the townspeople out of their land.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: When an officer taking prisoners across the desert is wounded in hostile territory, Bart must take over and is caught between the charms of a woman prisoner and a pending attack.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Young Mark Thompson shoots an old miner in the back, robs him, and flees. Sheriff Hollister trails him to his mother's home in Paradise. In order to expose the son's true character to his faithful mother, Hollister must put his own life on the line.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Against a background of sudden death and romance, Hollister comes to grips with beautiful young widow Sarah Curtice and her band of gunmen. Clay's efforts to combat their expanding crime wave provoke a dramatic showdown with Sarah's hired guns.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: When Chris Anderson confesses to Sheriff Hollister that Brewster Flat's Sheriff Binns and his deputy were in on a robbery, Sheriff Hollister 'cuts himself in' to the deal to force a showdown among the thieves and expose a double cross.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Convicted of murder, Sam Carver (Lee Van Cleef) escapes the custody of Deputy Marshal Bledsoe thanks to some rowdy conventioneers aboard the train. Jumping off, he heads to Tombstone Territory where he takes refuge at Hendrick's ranch.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sheriff Clay Hollister rides the stage to Laramie with a court order concerning a murder indictment against a man named Rowan. Clay finds that his fellow passengers include Rowan himself (under an alias) and a hired gun paid to kill the Sheriff.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Harvey Logan and his gunfighters take over the town of Sunglow and have themselves on a spree. Notified that the telegraph line to Sunglow is dead, Sheriff Hollister and editor Claibourne ride over to investigate and are trapped and thrown into jail.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister hears a distant shot but finds nothing to explain it. When Nancy Cooley arrives in Tombstone looking for her uncle who cannot be found, the sheriff solves the riddle of his disappearance and saves Nancy from becoming a gunman's victim.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: When a British writer arrives in Tombstone to gather material for a series about the American West, he tags along with Sheriff Hollister and a prisoner as they travel to Yuma prison. But the journalist is devising a dangerous plot.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: The great fire of 1881 nearly wiped out the town. As a result, Tombstone is in danger of losing its status as County Seat to nearby Benson, leading to a feud over the matter. Hollister's guns must right a wrong when fire mysteriously strikes again.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: A rancher hires a gunfighter (guest star James Coburn) to protect him from Jeff Harper, the last member of a family which has waged a feud with the rancher. Harper says he wants a truce with the rancher, but the hired gunfighter's trigger finger itches.

programme.title: Have Gun - Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin is hired to travel with adventurer Phileas Fogg during his 80 day trip around the world.

programme.title: Have Gun - Will Travel

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
